headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 28, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays secured a thrilling 3-2 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Daniel Schneemann leading the offense with a home run and two RBIs. The St. Louis Cardinals took down the Pittsburgh Pirates 4-2, thanks to JJ Wetherholt's home run and one RBI. The Boston Red Sox dominated the Toronto Blue Jays 5-0 behind Ranger Suarez's strong pitching performance.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. Tanner Murray has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder dislocation. Max Scherzer is on the 15-day injured list with right forearm tendinitis and left ankle inflammation. Logan O'Hoppe is out with a left wrist fracture, while Riley Martin is dealing with left elbow inflammation. Connor Seabold has left ankle inflammation, and Shawn Armstrong is recovering from a right groin strain.

The Toronto Blue Jays bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in a trade for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings. The Chicago Cubs acquired 3B Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies for cash. The Houston Astros traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake.

top_news.title: **Rays Edge Guardians in Thrilling 3-2 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a narrow win over the Cleveland Guardians, with a final score of 3-2. Daniel Schneemann led the Rays' offense with a home run and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Pirates 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 4-2 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with JJ Wetherholt leading the offense with a home run and one RBI. Ryan Fernandez earned the win with 2.0 scoreless innings, striking out 4 batters.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Shut Out Blue Jays 5-0**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Toronto Blue Jays, securing a 5-0 victory behind a strong pitching performance. Ranger Suarez led the way with 8.0 innings pitched, 10 strikeouts, and 0 earned runs allowed.

top_news.title: **Mariners Fall to Twins in Dominant 11-4 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners suffered a tough defeat at the hands of the Minnesota Twins, losing 11-4. Kody Clemens led the Mariners' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **White Sox Place Tanner Murray on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Chicago White Sox left fielder Tanner Murray has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder dislocation. The injury occurred on April 27, 2026.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Catcher Willie MacIver**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in a trade for cash.
